notes: HAR-262 captured Shopify Admin GraphQL 2026-04 BulkOperation reads, list empty filters, deprecated currentBulkOperation behavior, bulkOperationRunQuery validation, unknown-id cancel userErrors, terminal cancel userErrors, and safe query export status transitions. HAR-263 implements the local BulkOperation state/read/list/current/cancel foundation using that fixture evidence. HAR-265 adds runtime-test-backed local bulkOperationRunMutation import staging for already-supported product inner mutation roots, including staged upload handoff, result JSONL, unsupported-root failure, mutation-log ordering, and downstream product read-after-write behavior; exact Shopify import result-file schema and partial-failure status semantics still need live capture before this support broadens beyond product-local roots. bulkOperationRunQuery execution remains unsupported.
